config.training_policy: Fit on first 70% of train session, select on last 30% validation block, evaluate on full held-out session.
config.feature_policy: Causal anchor-time features only; future reference fields are labels/quality diagnostics and are excluded from model inputs.

gpu.reason: GPU was detected by shell precheck, but training stayed on CPU because this no-dependency Node.js experiment has no CUDA ML runtime.

models.description: Current DWM-aware last-two-sample predictor with gain 0.75.
Ridge linear model predicting target offset from anchor using causal timing/history features.
Ridge linear model predicting residual correction over the current baseline.
Ridge residual correction clipped by validation-selected px cap.
Small one-hidden-layer MLP predicting target offset from anchor using causal timing/history features.
Small one-hidden-layer MLP predicting residual correction over the current baseline.
Small residual MLP with validation-selected correction magnitude cap.

recommendation.rule: A learned model must improve average held-out cross-session p99 and have zero total >5 px regressions versus the current baseline. Otherwise keep the current deterministic baseline.
